title: Paradise City
why_this_song: Paradise City by Guns N' Roses (1987) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Take me down to the Paradise City
Where the grass is green and the girls are pretty (take me home)
Oh, won't you please take me home?
Take me down to the Paradise City

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "home" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "home" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "paradise" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "paradise" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Paradise City" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Paradise City", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Paradise City" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Paradise City" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Paradise City", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Paradise City", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Paradise City" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Paradise City" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?
